title: Blurred Window
description: Gives the Minecraft Window a Transparent and Acrylic background.
body:
Fully Client-Side mod, Fabric API not required.

Windows 10/11 and Linux (KDE) supported

![Main Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5fb0b87e609e395649219db85ef01b0b0218140f.png)
